scope.summary: Normalize every named Low and Very-Low finding from engineering-plan sections 28.3 and 28.4 into an individual implementation-ready bead, an evidence-backed already-resolved result, or an explicit evidence-backed wontfix decision.
out_of_scope: Implementing or closing the 20 normalized child beads.
Changing server or driver product source.
Release readiness, live Oracle validation, deployment, publication, or push.

entry_points.name: F-LOW plan-to-tracker coverage map
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/evidence/f-low-normalization/oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.7.11.json records 20 normalized beads, 6 already-resolved/non-beadable findings, 3 explicit wontfix decisions, and 0 unmapped findings across all 29 named items.

entry_points.name: individual implementation-ready child records
entry_points.trace: A structural jq audit found exactly 20 open P3 children matching the proof ID set; each has a plan external_ref, f-low and finding labels, parent-child dependency, exact Repo/site, Risk, Narrow fix, Negative acceptance, and Positive acceptance fields.

entry_points.name: one-bead-per-commit serialization
entry_points.trace: Twenty child-record commits from 5b3d2f904b914bec344c135eb2bc5b856787dfbf through c11f9f09bbf6501ded0ad1608205e8bae27b9e8b each add exactly one intended JSONL bead record; 7d0d384655d67d532c001ff39ce5e08288cbb3f5 separately makes the G2 risk field explicit.

entry_points.name: canonical tracker integrity
entry_points.trace: br sync --flush-only exported 1112 issues; JSONL line count and jq record count both equal 1112, IDs are unique, priority/compaction/original_size fields are numeric, database and JSONL counts match, sqlite integrity checks pass, and br dep cycles reports 0.

limitations: This closes normalization only: all 20 implementation beads remain open and no product fix is claimed.
The 6 already-resolved/non-beadable and 3 wontfix classifications are source-audit conclusions, not live Oracle tests.

br doctor reports pre-existing stale recovery artifacts and an old write-lock warning while all database/JSONL count, parse, orphan, dirty-bitmap, export-hash, and SQLite integrity checks pass; no cleanup was authorized.
The worktree is not globally clean because the unrelated pre-existing .doctor directory remains untracked and untouched.
No required-proof/v1 producer artifact exists for this planning-only close, so readiness remains not-ready with scoped-test basis.
